allow: Bash(python -c "import json; f = open\('skills/index.json', 'r', encoding='utf-8'\); data = json.load\(f\); print\(f'✅ 配置验证成功：'\); print\(f'通用技能数量：{len\(data[\\"skills\\"][\\"workflow\\"][\\"items\\"]\)}'\); print\(f'专业技能数量：{len\(data[\\"skills\\"][\\"professional\\"][\\"items\\"]\)}'\); print\(f'智能分析技能数量：{len\(data[\\"skills\\"][\\"intelligence\\"][\\"items\\"]\)}'\); print\(f'总技能数量：{len\(data[\\"skills\\"][\\"workflow\\"][\\"items\\"]\) + len\(data[\\"skills\\"][\\"professional\\"][\\"items\\"]\) + len\(data[\\"skills\\"][\\"intelligence\\"][\\"items\\"]\)}'\)")
